name: ContextReplica
description:
The script can download the exact replica of the Json context, as how it is in XSOAR issue/Incident context in UI.  This helps to download specific issue/incident context and use it offline to work with certain use cases (like Adaptive_card.json rendering, for teams notifications etc) . 

This works for XSIAM, Agentix and XSOAR platforms
author: Winston
